core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Stripe aesthetic mixed with Agency storytelling
Emotion First: Trust, Innovation, and Fluidity
Content is King: Every section drives the narrative of digital transformation

styles.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-[1.1] text-slate-900

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-100/50 transition-all duration-300
structure: Nav Links (Center): Products, Solutions, Developers, Resources, Pricing
Actions (Right): Sign in (Ghost), Contact Sales (Primary Pill)

buttons.primary: bg-[#635BFF] hover:bg-[#5851DF] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/20 hover:shadow-indigo-500/40 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-900 rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 transition-all

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-slate-200/50 transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-1 group

hero.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[90vh] relative overflow-hidden

content.headline: Transform Your Vision Into Digital Reality
content.description: Financial infrastructure to grow your revenue. Accept payments, offer financial services and implement custom revenue models.

visual.style: Absolute positioned div on right side (w-[150%] h-[150%] -top-1/4 -right-1/4) with the 'stripe_hero' gradient rotated -12deg. Add blur-3xl.

partners.content: Row of minimalist logos with opacity-50 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity grayscale hover:grayscale-0

creative_process.style: Vertical timeline with 4 steps. Step number (01, 02...) large and faded. Alternate left/right alignment on desktop.

impact_stats.style: Grid-cols-3. Large number (text-5xl font-bold text-[#635BFF]) + Label (text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500)

testimonials.style: Cards with large quote marks. Client photo (circle), Name (Bold), Title (Slate-500).

services_timeline.instructions: CRITICAL: Implement a scroll-linked vertical progress bar. A gray line (h-full w-1) runs down the center. A colored line (bg-[#635BFF]) overlays it, height controlled by scroll using framer-motion useScroll. Service items trigger animation when they come into view.

contact_form.style: Simple, clean form. Floating labels or crisp inputs with focus:ring-[#635BFF]. Located above footer.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Ensure Tailwind config includes the 'stripe_hero' gradient colors in 'extend'.
2. Navbar: Implement sticky navbar with backdrop-blur. Use <nav> tag. Ensure mobile menu is implemented (hamburger).
3. Hero: Do NOT use an image on the right. Use a DIV with the radial-gradient and blur effects to create the 'wave'. Text on left.
4. Services Timeline: Use 'framer-motion'. Create a ref for the container. Use useScroll({ target: ref }). Map the scrollYProgress to the height of the colored line.
5. Forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea, Button. Validate using Zod.
6. Footer: Simple 4-column layout. Brand left, links right.
7. Universal: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
